title: Window Functions
subtitle: ROW_NUMBER, RANK ve siralama fonksiyonlari.
code:
CREATE TABLE students (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    grade REAL
);

CREATE TABLE employees (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    name TEXT,
    department_id INTEGER,
    salary REAL
);

INSERT INTO students (name, grade) VALUES
    ('Ahmet Yilmaz', 85.50),
    ('Ayse Kaya', 92.00),
    ('Mehmet Demir', 67.25),
    ('Zeynep Sahin', 78.75),
    ('Can Ozturk', 55.00);

INSERT INTO employees (name, department_id, salary) VALUES
    ('Ahmet', 1, 25000),
    ('Ayse', 1, 28000),
    ('Mehmet', 2, 22000),
    ('Zeynep', 2, 20000),
    ('Can', 1, 18000);

-- ROW_NUMBER: her satira sira numarasi ver
SELECT
    name,
    grade,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY grade DESC) AS row_num
FROM students;

-- RANK: ayni degerler ayni sirayi alir (atlama olur)
SELECT
    name,
    grade,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY grade DESC) AS rank_position
FROM students;

-- DENSE_RANK: ayni degerler ayni sirayi alir (atlama olmaz)
SELECT
    name,
    grade,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY grade DESC) AS dense_rank_position
FROM students;

-- PARTITION BY ile gruplandirilmis siralama
-- (her departmanda kendi sirasi)
SELECT
    name,
    department_id,
    salary,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY department_id ORDER BY salary DESC) AS dept_rank
FROM employees;

-- LAG / LEAD: onceki/sonraki satira erisim
SELECT
    name,
    grade,
    LAG(grade) OVER (ORDER BY grade DESC) AS previous_grade,
    LEAD(grade) OVER (ORDER BY grade DESC) AS next_grade
FROM students;

-- Kumulatif toplam
SELECT
    name,
    salary,
    SUM(salary) OVER (ORDER BY id) AS running_total
FROM employees;
